---
jupyter:
  jupytext:
    text_representation:
      extension: .Rmd
      format_name: rmarkdown
      format_version: '1.2'
      jupytext_version: 1.18.1
  kernelspec:
    display_name: Python 3 (ipykernel)
    language: python
    name: python3
---

```{python}
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
```

```{python}
data_dir ='mc_data'
```

```{python}
name = '16x16_b0400'
```

```{python}
em = np.loadtxt(f"{data_dir}/em_{name}.txt")
```

```{python}
em.shape
```

```{python}
plt.hist(em[:,1], bins=100);
```

```{python}
from neumc.utils.stats_utils import ac_and_tau_int
```

```{python}
tau, ac = ac_and_tau_int(em[:,1], maxlen=4000)
print(tau)
```

```{python}
plt.scatter(np.arange(len(ac)), ac,s=1); 
```

```{python}
np.log(1+np.sqrt(2))/2
```

```{python}

```
